title: Ukraine strikes Russia's lifeblood by targeting oil ports
subhead: Long-range Ukrainian drones hit three key infrastructures for Russian crude oil exports, as Kyiv aims to limit Moscow's windfall from surging oil prices.

Joël Soudron, one of France's most notorious drug traffickers, is arrested in Panama
subhead: Soudron was the subject of an Interpol Red Notice and two arrest warrants. He had been sought by the French National Fugitive Search Brigade since his escape in 2018.

title: Israel introduces death penalty for Palestinians accused of 'terrorist' murders
subhead: The law, passed by 62 lawmakers to 48, marks turning point in Israel's penal policy and further weakens the rule of law in the country.

title: Spice up your life! Five Paris restaurants where you can eat spicy food
subhead: Mexican chipotle, Korean kimchi, Tunisian harissa: Whether mild or fiery, these condiments add zest to dishes from around the world. Here are five addresses in Paris and Montreuil to awaken your taste buds.

title: France has yet to find a forward-looking political discourse on racism
subhead: While Bally Bagayoko, the newly-elected mayor of Saint-Denis, has responded with composure to the media storm unleashed against him, leftist leader Jean-Luc Mélenchon is 'feeding the identity-based rhetoric of the far right,' writes Le Monde columnist Philippe Bernard.
